zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Andrews於1481年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Thomas Andrews II13歲，母親Emma Knightley18歲。她於1499年與Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1548年在英國瓦維其可爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Andrews于1481年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Thomas Andrews II13岁，母亲Emma Knightley18岁。她于1499年与Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1548年在英国瓦維其可爾享年67岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Andrews was born in 1481, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Thomas Andrews II, was 13 and her mother, Emma Knightley, was 18. She married Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote in 1499, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1548, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Andrews est née en 1481, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Andrews II, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Emma Knightley, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote en 1499, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1548, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Andrews 1481 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Andrews II 13 und ihre Mutter Emma Knightley 18. Sie hat 1499 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1548 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Warwickshire, England und wurde in Warwickshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote nel 1499, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1548, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Andrewsが1481年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Andrews IIは13歳，母Emma Knightleyは18歳であった。1499年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでSir Thomas Arden of Wilmcoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1548年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで67歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Park Hall, Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 카스틀 브롬위치
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Andrews(이)가 1481년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Andrews II(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Knightley(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 워윅실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Andrews nasceu em 1481, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Andrews II, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Emma Knightley, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote em 1499, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1548, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Park Hall, Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire: кастл бромвич, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Andrews родилась в 1481 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Andrews II было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Knightley, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote в 1499 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1548 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Andrews nació en 1481, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Andrews II, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Emma Knightley, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote en 1499, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1548, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
